chain.thought: Explanation: The score format shows goals.behinds (total points). Counting premiers whose goals (the first number) exceed 10: 2003 (14), 2004 (17), 2005 (19), 2006 (11), 2007 (14), 2008 (12), 2011 (11), 2012 (17), and 2013 (14). There are 9 such instances.

judge_thought:
Explanation: The scores are given in goals.behinds (total points). Interpreting “more than ten” as goals > 10 for the premiers, the qualifying years are:
2003 (14), 2004 (17), 2005 (19), 2006 (11), 2007 (14), 2008 (12), 2011 (11), 2012 (17), 2013 (14) — 9 in total.
Years not exceeding ten goals: 2009 (9), 2010 (8).
Therefore, the count is 9.
